sapling.open-diff-uncommitted-command: Open Diff View For Current File (Uncommitted Changes)
sapling.open-diff-head-command: Open Diff View For Current File (Head Changes)
sapling.open-diff-stack-command: Open Diff View For Current File (Stack Changes)
sapling.revert-file-command: Revert uncommitted change to this file
settings.isl.openBeside.description: If true, files, diffs, and comparisons will open beside the existing ISL panel instead of in the same View Column. Useful to keep ISL open and visible when clicking on files.
settings.isl.showInSidebar.description: If true, Interactive Smartlog will appear in the sidebar as a view. If false, Interactive Smartlog will appear as a normal panel like an editor. Restart to take full effect.
settings.isl.showOpenOrFocusButtonOnEdit: Show the Open or Focus Interactive Smartlog button on the active Editor's title/tab bar.
settings.commandPath.description: Controls which executable to use for running Sapling commands. Default: use `sl` on your PATH. Restart required to take effect.
settings.showInlineBlame.description: Whether to show inline blame annotations next to your cursor when browsing files in Sapling repos.
settings.showDiffComments.description: Whether to show Phabricator Diff comments and inline code suggestions.
settings.diffViewMode.description: Whether to show code suggestion with unified or split diff view
settings.markConflictingFilesResolvedOnS: Whether to mark files with merge conflicts as resolved after saving them with no remaining conflict markers.
settings.comparisonPanelMode.description: How comparisons should be displayed when viewing diffs and changes.
settings.comparisonPanelMode.enumDescrip: Show comparisons inside the ISL window when ISL is active, and otherwise use VS Code's native multi-diff editor
Always open VS Code's native multi-diff editor to view comparisons
isl.title: Interactive Smartlog
settings.isl.showInlineSignals.descripti: Controls which inline diff signals are shown in the editor. Signals are CI results such as lint errors, test failures, and other diagnostics.
settings.isl.showInlineSignals.enumDescr: Show all inline signals regardless of severity.
Only show signals with error or warning severity.
Only show signals with error severity.
settings.isl.inlineSignalsRenderMode.des: Controls how inline diff signals are rendered in the editor.
settings.isl.inlineSignalsRenderMode.enu: Render inline signals as inset webviews with rich controls.
Render inline signals as standard VS Code diagnostics and squiggles.
sapling.toggle-inline-comments-command: Toggle Show/Hide Inline Code Review Comments
